prose:
Ferrocene's fukui reactivity has been computed using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The geometry was sourced from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz`.

The iron atom (Fe, atom index 10) is both the most electrophilic and most nucleophilic site in ferrocene. The Fukui f+ index for the most electrophilic site (Fe) is 0.22885456, and the Fukui f- index for the most nucleophilic site (Fe) is 0.25938191. The total number of atoms in the molecule is 21.
